classification_rationale: Generic Click-based CLI framework with zero AFI protocol surface. README.md:3 "A shared CLI framework for AFI Python projects, built on Click." pyproject.toml:13 description "Shared CLI framework for AFI Python projects using Click". Source (src/afi_cli_shared/*.py) contains only BaseCli, ConfigManager, validation helpers, error handling, and an Extension system; scripts/lib/afi-shared.sh adds bash logging/docker/file utilities. A full pattern sweep for mongodb|TSSD|vault|USS|CPJ|mint|epoch|replay|determinism|DAG|reactor|BigQuery|schema|receipt|signal|emission returned NO MATCHES anywhere in source, tests, or docs. It is shared tooling consumed by AFI Python repos, not a protocol artifact.
primary_purpose: A reusable, domain-agnostic shared CLI framework for AFI Python projects built on Click — providing BaseCli (a click.Group subclass), a hierarchical ConfigManager (defaults -> .afi-cli.json -> AFI_CLI_* env vars), validation/error-handling helpers, an Extension/ExtensionManager plugin system, plus a Bash utility library (scripts/lib/afi-shared.sh) for logging, docker/podman, and file operations.

downstream: AFI Python CLI repos that pip install afi-cli-shared and extend BaseCli, or source scripts/lib/afi-shared.sh (consumers not enumerable from within this repo)

notable_findings.title: No protocol surface present
notable_findings.evidence: ripgrep over all non-pyc files for mongodb|TSSD|vault|USS|CPJ|mint|epoch|beneficiary|replay|determinism|DAG|orchestrator|BigQuery|kafka|normative|canonical|postgresql|timescaledb|influxdb|signalId|on-chain|emission returned 'NO MATCHES'; a second sweep of tests/ and src/ for signal|score|mint|reactor|gateway|schema|anchor|receipt|registr|reputation|enrich returned 'NO DOMAIN MATCHES'
notable_findings.recommendation: Classify as SUPPORTING tooling; exclude from protocol-surface synthesis.

notable_findings.title: Sole runtime dependency is click (stack-agnostic)
notable_findings.recommendation: none; confirms no coupling to any mandated AFI stack (Mongo, reactor, BASE, etc.).
